name: Aspen Mesh
description: Aspen Mesh — Istio-based enterprise service mesh with dashboards for observability, traffic management, and mTLS enforcement.

seo.title: Aspen Mesh — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Aspen Mesh: Aspen Mesh — Istio-based enterprise service mesh with dashboards for observability, traffic management, and mTLS enforcement.

when_to_use: Enterprise service mesh with mTLS between Kubernetes services
Traffic management and canary deployments with Istio policies
Observability dashboards over Istio telemetry in Kubernetes
Enforcing zero-trust security policies between microservices
Replacing Linkerd with Istio-based enterprise service mesh

pros: Enterprise polish on top of Istio
review.verdict: Useful Istio wrapper for regulated enterprises, but a heavy bet given the product's uncertain roadmap.
review.best_for: Regulated enterprises needing managed Istio with audit-ready dashboards
review.not_for: Small teams wanting lean service mesh without Istio overhead
